sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23093" key="gu/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γύριος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γυρός</etym>) <sense id="n23093.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">circular, round,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λίμνη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
